title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: Verify that the "Update All" button triggers a single-step DFU process with a unified progress bar (0% to 99%) for simultaneously updating both earbuds and charge case.
steps: Locate the 'Update All' button on the device management screen.
Tap the 'Update All' button to initiate the DFU process.
Observe the progress bar displayed on the screen.
Wait for the progress bar to advance from 0% to 99%.
Confirm that the update completes without errors.
expected: Both earbuds and charge case update in one unified progress bar (0% to 99%) on a single screen, completing successfully.
